source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Inter for fast product messaging UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels, compact status trails, and tabular delivery metrics.
layout: 8px grid, compact inbox rails, wing-sweep motion marks, queue lanes, delivery status trails, cloud-white cards, sky-field surfaces, and rust-throat action accents.

prompts.label: Transparent swallow motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create a single swallow bird motif for a Morphous design-system asset on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: one agile barn swallow in flight, full body visible, long forked tail, swept swallow wings extended in a swift V arc, glossy blue-black upper wings and back, warm rust throat, pale underside, small precise head and beak. The bird should feel like a fast summer-field messenger: aerodynamic, crisp, elegant, and natural.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; no cropping of wing tips, tail streamers, beak, or body. Slight three-quarter angle so the wing silhouette is clear and iconic.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves glossy blue-black feather sheen, rust throat, and subtle feather structure. No environment, no props, no text.
Transparent workflow: background must be one uniform #ff00ff color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject. No cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no watermark.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board for a theme named Swallow
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a motif-driven UI theme named "Swallow", derived from swallow wings in a summer field: glossy blue-black flight feathers, rust throat accent, pale underside, open sky blue, sunlit field green kept subtle, and warm dry grass neutrals.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution design board, 4K-class composition intended for final use at 3840x2160. Use a precise product-design grid, generous margins, and large readable labels.
System feel: swift messaging system. The UI should feel fast, directional, lightweight, and operational: message queue lanes, wing-sweep motion marks, delivery status trails, compact inbox navigation, signal chips, timeline handoff cards, crisp shadcn/tweakcn-style controls, 8px radius.
Required visible sections: title "Swallow", motif story, palette swatches with names, typography with English and Japanese examples, compact left navigation, top command/search, inbox and message thread preview, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, delivery status table, form fields, textarea composer, select, tabs, buttons, badges, alerts, checkbox/radio/switch controls, loading/empty/error states, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, CSS token snippets, texture strip, and generated asset examples.
Palette to show and use consistently: Sky Field #eef7fb background, Cloud White #fbfdff cards, Blue Black #17263a primary, Flight Navy #24445f secondary, Rust Throat #b95f35 accent, Horizon Blue #72a9c9 chart/accent, Hayline #d6bf7c muted warning, Reed Gray #9aa8aa borders, Field Green #7f9d65 sparingly, Night Wing #0c1624 dark ink.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs. Use generic product UI labels such as Inbox, Dispatch, Threads, Queue, Signal, Sent, Pending, Delivered, Compose, Route, Analytics, Search, Ready, Delay, Alert.
Constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no unrelated saturated colors, no purple gradients, no marketing hero layout, no illegible microtext, no decorative blobs.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board for a theme named Swallow
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Swallow Dark". It must feel like the same swift messaging system translated to dark mode, not a new theme. Base it on swallow wings in a summer field: glossy blue-black feathers, rust throat accent, pale underside highlights, open sky blue, restrained field green, and warm dry grass neutrals.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution design board, 4K-class composition intended for final use at 3840x2160. Use a precise product-design grid, generous margins, and large readable labels.
System feel: swift messaging system. The UI should feel fast, directional, lightweight, and operational: message queue lanes, wing-sweep motion marks, delivery status trails, compact inbox navigation, signal chips, timeline handoff cards, crisp shadcn/tweakcn-style controls, 8px radius.
Required visible sections: title "Swallow Dark", motif story, dark palette swatches with names, typography with English and Japanese examples, compact left navigation, top command/search, inbox and message thread preview, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, delivery status table, form fields, textarea composer, select, tabs, buttons, badges, alerts, checkbox/radio/switch controls, loading/empty/error states, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, CSS token snippets, texture strip, and generated asset examples.
Palette to show and use consistently: Night Wing #0c1624 background, Deep Navy #132235 panels, Moon Cloud #edf5f7 text, Blue Black #17263a primary surface, Flight Navy #24445f secondary, Rust Throat #cf7040 accent, Horizon Blue #72a9c9 chart/accent, Hayline #d6bf7c muted warning, Reed Gray #7f8d91 borders, Field Green #8bad72 sparingly.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs. Use generic product UI labels such as Inbox, Dispatch, Threads, Queue, Signal, Sent, Pending, Delivered, Compose, Route, Analytics, Search, Ready, Delay, Alert.
Constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no neon colors, no pure black flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no purple gradients, no marketing hero layout, no illegible microtext, no decorative blobs.
